title: The World Reacts to Wano
description: On pages 1–3, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Wano Citizens, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Luffy, Nami as New bounties and the Cross Guild reshape the world after Wano, while the Straw Hats sail away from the closed country.
scene: New bounties and the Cross Guild reshape the world after Wano, while the Straw Hats sail away from the closed country.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: The ship follows the log pose...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You sorry excuse for a captain!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That brain dead stunt almost killed the entire crew!! ]

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's a limit to how much stupidity we'll swallow!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Don't be too hard on him.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We need to keep him on a tight leash, jinbe!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Never cross Nami when she's mad!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: See how tough sunny is?! A drop like that...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and we only busted a small yard on the mast!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Looks like we've got new bouties.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Updated Bounties for the leaders of the 5,600 man grand fleet,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Doctor, chopper the cotton candy lover (pet)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hundreds of millions?! Even I'd go after someone with this bounty!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Are 'A KIDDIN' me?! I'm not even on this!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Please... no more! Don't get any higher!!

summary: This part advances the Post-Wano World Shift through 42 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
